summary: Extend ClearTokens to also zero FreshserviceApikey and AuthHeaderVal so `auth logout` actually drops the credential under Freshservice's API-key/Basic auth model.
reason: Greptile P1 on PR #533. Generator's ClearTokens is OAuth-shaped — it clears AccessToken/RefreshToken/TokenExpiry but leaves the API-key fields intact. Because AuthHeader() rebuilds the Basic credential from FreshserviceApikey, every command run after `auth logout` continued to authenticate successfully.
validated_outcome: `auth logout` followed by any authenticated command now fails with 'no credentials configured' as expected; previously the command succeeded as if logout had never happened.
